Michael Johnson
Charlotte, NC

SUMMARY
Dedicated and hardworking dock worker with over 2 years of experience in freight handling and logistics. Proven ability to operate forklifts and manage inventory efficiently. Strong physical stamina and commitment to safety protocols, looking to contribute to a fast-paced team.

EXPERIENCE
Dock Worker
ABC Freight Solutions, Charlotte, NC  
March 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently loaded and unloaded freight from trucks, ensuring accuracy and adherence to safety standards.  
- Operated forklifts to move and stack pallets, maintaining a clean and organized work environment.  
- Assisted in inventory management and tracking shipments to ensure timely delivery to clients.

Warehouse Associate  
XYZ Distribution Center, Concord, NC  
June 2019 - February 2021  
- Supported warehouse operations by preparing orders for shipment, lifting packages up to 75 lbs repeatedly.  
- Collaborated with team members to optimize workflow and improve overall productivity.  
- Conducted regular safety checks on equipment and reported any issues to management.

CERTIFICATIONS
- Forklift Operator Certification, North Carolina Department of Labor, 2021  

SKILLS
- Forklift operation  
- Freight handling  
- Inventory management  
- Team collaboration  
- Strong physical stamina  

EDUCATION
High School Diploma  
Charlotte High School, Charlotte, NC
